# Murtaza Ahmed
## Backend & Infrastructure Consultant

> Specializing in backend systems, distributed infrastructure, and platform engineering. I help teams build systems that scale.

## Contact Information
- Email: murtazaofficial@proton.me
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/murahmed/
- GitHub: https://github.com/onerealti

## Performance Metrics
- 99.9% Uptime SLA delivered
- 120ms p99 API latency
- 500K+ Requests/day handled
- 35% Infrastructure cost reduction

## Core Competencies
- Languages: Go, Python, Ruby
- Infrastructure: AWS, Kubernetes, Terraform, Route53, CloudFront
- Data & Streaming: PostgreSQL, Redis, Apache Kafka
- Architecture: Microservices, Event-Driven Architecture, Multi-Region Active-Active Deployments

---

## Notable Case Studies

### Migrating a Monolith to Event-Driven Microservices
Decomposed a 500k-line Rails monolith into event-driven services (Payments, Identity, Ledger, Notifications) written in Go, communicating via Apache Kafka. 
**Results:** 
- Deploy time reduced from 45 minutes to 18 minutes (60% improvement).
- Eliminated cascading failures entirely over a 6-month period.
- p99 API latency dropped from 800ms to 250ms due to service-level caching.

### Building a Multi-Region API Platform at Scale
Designed and deployed a globally distributed active-active API platform across 3 AWS regions handling 500k+ daily requests. Managed via Terraform.
**Results:** 
- p99 API latency reduced from 400ms to 120ms globally.
- Achieved 99.9% uptime over 12 months.
- Preserved ₹40L ARR in at-risk enterprise contracts by eliminating SLA violations.

### Cutting Cloud Infrastructure Costs by 60%
Audited and restructured an AWS bill, moving compute to Graviton instances, implementing aggressive auto-scaling, and utilizing Spot Instances and Reserved Instances.
**Results:**
- Monthly AWS bill reduced from ₹15L to ₹9.75L (35% reduction).
- Annual savings of ₹63L, extending startup runway by 8 months.
- Infrastructure-as-code coverage increased from 60% to 95%.
